## What's changed

Focus on alert-detail navigation, retention housekeeping, and a batch of
history-tracking correctness fixes.

### Added
- Navigate between sibling alerts in a group directly from the detail panel
- New `@age` and `@claimed-by` advanced filter expressions for the alert list
- Related tab in the alert detail panel, surfacing alerts sharing labels
- Reworked comments and detail-panel layout for readability
- Optional data-retention sweeper to prune old alert history automatically
- Jarvis now identifies itself via a dedicated User-Agent on Alertmanager requests

### Fixed
- Heatmap now buckets by `recorded_at` instead of `starts_at`, fixing misplaced entries
- Alert detail panel is now responsive on narrow viewports
- 20-minute resolved-alert removal timer no longer deletes alerts that re-fire in that window
- Grace period now scales with `JARVIS_POLL_INTERVAL` instead of a fixed window
- Alerts resolved while Jarvis was restarted are now reconciled correctly on startup
- A failed cluster fetch no longer drops alerts — the last-known-good snapshot is kept
- Firing episodes are deduped by `starts_at` in `GetFiringStarts`

### Security
- WebSocket upgrade (`/ws`) now requires authentication in `full_protect` mode

**Full diff:** [v1.7.0...v1.8.0](https://github.com/kj187/jarvis/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
